metadata.title: Spain EOR Services | Employer of Record Spain – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Spain EOR and Employer of Record Spain services. Hire employees in Spain without entity. Spanish employment laws 2026, Spain payroll outsourcing, Seguridad Social compliance, NIE/TIE visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Spain without entity

faqs.title: Spain EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in Spain.

items.question: How much does Spain EOR cost?
items.answer: Spain EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus salary, employer Seguridad Social contributions, and tax withholdings. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, extra pay (pagas extraordinarias) structure, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in Spain with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank Spain EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity (S.L./S.A.) is required, avoiding lengthy incorporation and registration.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in Spain without an entity?
items.answer: With a compliant Spain EOR, the EOR is the legal employer in Spain. They assume obligations under the Workers' Statute (Estatuto de los Trabajadores), Seguridad Social, tax, and dismissal rules. You reduce misclassification, permanent establishment, and local compliance gaps when working with an established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does Spain EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under a Spanish employment contract (contrato de trabajo) compliant with Spanish law, including probation (periodo de prueba), vacation (vacaciones retribuidas), extra payments (pagas extraordinarias) where applicable, and Seguridad Social registration. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our Spanish entity.

items.question: Can you sponsor work authorization for Spain EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support NIE/TIE processes, work and residence authorisation for non-EU nationals, highly qualified permits, and EU Blue Card where eligible, coordinating with immigration authorities so you can hire through our Spain EOR.
